title: Petstone
description: Create your own "Petstone" by linking with any block to unlock various buffs and unique special effects.
body:
# MOD Description: Petstone
"A single companion, endless configurations. Link to any block and make it your own."
Petstone is not just another pet MOD; it’s a modular, invincible companion system designed for efficiency and tactical depth. While other pets might fall in battle, the Petstone stands by your side forever, evolving its capabilities based on the block it is linked to.
 

## Key Features:
Modular Evolution: The Petstone’s core stats—movement speed, attack power, and special effects—are determined by its linked block. Experiment with different blocks to find the perfect build for your playstyle.
Remote Utility: Gain remote access to functional blocks. Link your Petstone to any block, including Chests, Crafting Tables, and Furnaces, to manage your inventory and process resources from a distance.
Strategic Combat: Use the "Link Stone" to hot-swap your Petstone’s abilities mid-battle. Adapt instantly to any situation by changing its linked properties on the fly.
Simple Summoning: Start your journey by crafting a core from Cobblestone, Soul Sand, Obsidian, and a Redstone Repeater.
Forget managing multiple pets for different tasks. With Petstone, one loyal partner is all you need to master your environment.
